title: Walkthrough: in-app tour engine — Demo + Guided + Escape

segments.subtitle: One engine, two players: Demo performs the steps; Guided spotlights and waits. Escape exits.

beats.caption: DEMO player on Compose — the engine spotlights each element and performs the step itself
beats.expectedScreen: the Compose page with a dimmed tour overlay, a spotlight cutout, and a caption card

beats.caption: Each step shows a caption + a step counter; the Demo auto-advances
beats.expectedScreen: a tour caption card and a step counter over the Compose page

beats.caption: GUIDED player on Quarters — the engine spotlights the target and waits for the user, validating via the step assert
beats.expectedScreen: the Quarters page with a tour spotlight and caption

beats.caption: Escape exits any tour cleanly — the overlay is gone
beats.expectedScreen: the Quarters page with NO tour overlay

highlight.note: 2 explicit tours (demo + guided) + a synthesized tour per UI Fitting

segments.subtitle: Demo + Guided players, a tour per Fitting, Escape exits, Assistant Guide launches by name
